Extremely disappointing experience.
The delivery time was initially set to 20:02, then pushed to 20:50 only after I requested an update, and the order finally arrived at 21:35. That’s over 1.5 hours delay.
During this time, I tried contacting the restaurant multiple times with no answer. I also requested cancellation before delivery due to the excessive delay, but this was ignored.
What’s even worse is the customer service. Instead of addressing the issue properly, I received generic responses and a complete refusal to refund, even though the service was clearly not delivered within a reasonable timeframe.
This is not just about a delay, it’s about poor handling of the situation and lack of accountability.
I will not be using this platform again.

I am a client for years from a restaurant that I trust, never had problems because they had ther own deluvery giys.
Now they have to rely on thuisbezorgd delivery people which I have already made an ethical complaint.
Yesterday I made an order, got a message of delivered, never was, I was going to call the restaurant and I got a message saying the order was cancelled, I called the restaurant, he was also confused so I decided to order again.
This time I was tracking my order, I see the delivery man in a building 200 meters from mine sending me messages saying he was at my door, but somehow I could not answer, so he put the food back in his scooter and leaves and again the app say it was delivered.
A few problems I have with this situation. First the delivery guys don't know how to read addresses, second they say they delivered something they never did, 3rd not even the restaurant knows they didn't delivered and what happened with the food this 2 times?
Not just I lost the order from the 2 that day, my kids were waiting since 18:30 to 21:00, and I had to order from another platform. So I spent 3 times the money because of thuisbezorgd.

I had to call 5 times the restaurant yesterday and today, because I don't want the restaurant to have problems because it's not their fault to solve this situation because thuisbezorgd if the restaurant didn't call them they would not have given my money back.
Just so it is clear I made a formal ethics complaint.
And I will also be filling a complaint in Autoriteit Consument & Markt (ACM).
Not just because of the behaviour of the employees, the lack of clarity, the difficulty to enter in contact or make a complaint but also for the unnecessary problems they caused to a person that can't walk due to an accident and have a child that needs to eat.
It is unacceptable the behaviour.

Dear Parulewicz​,

Thank you for your message regarding the reviews.

When a customer leaves a review, both the quality of the food and the delivery service can be rated; the average is then calculated. The total score of a Restaurant Partner is immediately visible to customers on the search page, displayed as stars or a number.

This score is the average* of all reviews from the past 12 months and is updated immediately with each new review. Rest assured: our Restaurant Partners have access to valuable customer feedback so they can make improvements to their offerings and service where necessary.

Above all, the Thuisbezorgd.nl website and app (http://thuisbezorgd.nl) clearly explain how the star rating works (https://www.thuisbezorgd.nl/klantenservice/artikel/hoe-werken-sterrenbeoordelingen) to ensure complete transparency for our customers.

Thank you for reaching out and giving me the chance to look into this for you. If there’s anything else you need help with, please head over to our FAQ in our Help Center (https://www.thuisbezorgd.nl/en/customerservice) via the app or website.

Kind regards,

Peter - Team Thuisbezorgd.nl

For several days, I was unable to reach anyone regarding an order that was never delivered. This caused a significant inconvenience, especially considering that I am a regular Thuisbezorgd customer with frequent weekly orders.

After over 1 week from the issue, I got the refund and a 10% voucher on the next order, with a validity of 1 week.

For an issue of this scale — a non-delivered order, delayed support, and lack of timely communication — I expected more appropriate compensation, both in value and in a reasonable validity period. The current resolution is disappointing and does not reflect the level of service I would expect as a loyal customer.

I sent them another email on this, and their answer =>
"We are sorry to hear that understand that you wish to see a solution for this.

We apologize for the inconvenience, but we are unable to offer any further compensation."

Note that I wasn't able to use ANY compensation on this!

The Trustpilot Experience
Anyone can write a Trustpilot review. People who write reviews have ownership to edit or delete them at any time, and they’ll be displayed as long as an account is active.
We champion verified reviews
Companies can ask for reviews via automatic invitations. Labeled Verified, they’re about genuine experiences.Learn more about other kinds of reviews.
We fight fake reviews
We use dedicated people and clever technology to safeguard our platform. Find out how we combat fake reviews.
We show the latest reviews
Learn about Trustpilot’s review process.
We encourage constructive feedback
Here are 8 tips for writing great reviews.
Verification can help ensure real people are writing the reviews you read on Trustpilot.
We advocate against bias
Offering incentives for reviews or asking for them selectively can bias the TrustScore, which goes against our guidelines.
Guidelines for Reviewers
Modern Slavery Statement
Enhance your experience
Provide social media features
Analyze, monitor, and improve our services
Show personalized content and ads, depending on your settings
Strictly necessary cookies
These cookies are essential for you to browse the website and use its features, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms (which is why you can’t opt out of them).
These cookies allow us to track visits, traffic sources and clicks so we can measure and improve the performance of our website.
Functionality cookies

These cookies allow a website to remember your personal preferences (e.g. what language setting you prefer), and ensure that all of our services function properly. These cookies may be set by us or third-party providers that we work with.
These cookies track your online activity to help our advertising partners deliver more targeted ads or to limit how many times you see an ad, based on your browsing behavior and internet device.

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

3/18/2026 | discovered multiple unauthorized charges on my account totaling $595.30, which I believe to be fraudulent. Upon noticing these transactions, l immediately contacted Uber Eats support and provided all relevant information regarding the charges. I formally filed a complaint and clearly stated that these transactions were not authorized by me, requesting a full refund. Despite my prompt report and cooperation, Uber Eats reviewed the case and determined that the charges were legitimate. They have since denied my refund request and are refusing to take further action to resolve the matter.

I decided to try driving for UberEats as a side hustle. Today I drove 82 miles, spent 3 & 1/2 hrs driving and made $38. WTH?

One trip was 33 miles 1-way. All for peanut pay. I then had to drive 27 miles back to my place.

Save your time and your gas. Not worth driving for them at all. You'd make more money working at McDonald's for minimum wage - and no gas expenses or wear and tear on your car.

⭐ 1 Star — Would Give Zero If I Could

This review is based solely on my personal experience with Uber Eats. I was charged a $50.75 cancellation fee for a business lunch order from CAVA on February 3, 2026, at 12:19 p.m., which I canceled after an unreasonably and unusually long wait time in my opinion and a lack of clear updates about the order status. An hour after placing the order, the app still showed “order is being prepared” with a delivery time of 1:55 p.m. This was much longer than what I had previously experienced when ordering from the same restaurant also through Uber Eats.

I tried to get reassurance from both Uber Eats and CAVA. Uber Eats advised me to call the restaurant, but CAVA was unreachable. With no communication and a time‑sensitive business lunch approaching, I canceled the order through Uber Help. I found out later that a $50.75 cancellation fee had been applied.

Although I successfully disputed the charge with my credit card company, the amount continued to appear as outstanding on my Uber Eats account. I attempted several times to contest it through the app to no avail. I also did NOT find any customer hotline or email address where I could escalate my complaint. There was no clear way to reach anyone else for support.

In the end, I paid the fee to protect my credit standing. After this experience, I stopped using Uber Eats and switched to DoorDash, which had been far more reliable for me.

There were missing items from my order & there is no way of reporting a complaint or getting a refund through the app or Help line - they block you through the process. This is not the first time I have had issue with Uber - another missing item order or they either charge you on a ride for waiting time, when the actually waiting is the customer & not the driver. I don't think it is Uber themselves - yet the people who work for them -they are not trustworthy & know how to play with the app processing. I actually managed to get a refund in that instance (Uber were helpful), yet now there is a change to the app help system. Trying to report an issue where you are no way at fault, there is absolutely no way of getting through to support .
Perhaps they should consider what poor staff & customer service does in the long run!!

The Trustpilot Experience
Anyone can write a Trustpilot review. People who write reviews have ownership to edit or delete them at any time, and they’ll be displayed as long as an account is active.
We champion verified reviews
Companies can ask for reviews via automatic invitations. Labeled Verified, they’re about genuine experiences.Learn more about other kinds of reviews.
We fight fake reviews
We use dedicated people and clever technology to safeguard our platform. Find out how we combat fake reviews.
We show the latest reviews
Learn about Trustpilot’s review process.
We encourage constructive feedback
Here are 8 tips for writing great reviews.
Verification can help ensure real people are writing the reviews you read on Trustpilot.
We advocate against bias
Offering incentives for reviews or asking for them selectively can bias the TrustScore, which goes against our guidelines.
Guidelines for Reviewers
Modern Slavery Statement
Enhance your experience
Provide social media features
Analyze, monitor, and improve our services
Show personalized content and ads, depending on your settings
Strictly necessary cookies
These cookies are essential for you to browse the website and use its features, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms (which is why you can’t opt out of them).
These cookies allow us to track visits, traffic sources and clicks so we can measure and improve the performance of our website.
Functionality cookies

These cookies allow a website to remember your personal preferences (e.g. what language setting you prefer), and ensure that all of our services function properly. These cookies may be set by us or third-party providers that we work with.
These cookies track your online activity to help our advertising partners deliver more targeted ads or to limit how many times you see an ad, based on your browsing behavior and internet device.
checkbox label label

chef_listing_intel: We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic.
We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners.

Marketing   23 Marketing cookies are used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user and thereby more valuable for publishers and third party advertisers.
